top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';
